summary: A scrappy yet fiery show captured in a nicely balanced audience recording with clear overall sound but some vocal roughness.
review: The performance is energetic and full of wonderful moments despite occasional dropped lyrics and rough vocals from both Garcia and Weir. The recording, made by Daweez and d5scott, sounds good overall and conveys the fire of the night, though it isn’t pristine. Overall the set feels short and a bit rough around the edges but still rewarding for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is decent (fiery playing, some vocal issues) and recording quality is good (clear mix). Limited to two reviews, one low and one high, giving a moderate confidence level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall clear and balanced sound; occasional vocal dropouts and roughness in the singers' voices but no major mix problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short, energetic set that feels a bit scrappy yet delivers fiery playing throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Rough vocal at times but moments of great form; possible legal run‑in mentioned.
